content: did you eat?
haan mumma, i ate already, dont worry 😭
what did you eat?
pasta and sandwich, aree yaar not much 😊
will you have lunch then or youll skip?
thoda light lunch karungi, salad or sandwich or smthn 💅🏻
beta kab sogi?
thoda late ho jayega mumma, college ke kaam hai abhi 🤷🏻‍♀️
kitni frankie leke aau
aree yaar 2 leke aa, ek mere liye ek bhaiya ke liye 😊
Kintni frankie leke aau?
bas 2 hi, ek meri liye ek dev ke liye 😊
aur kuch chahiye?
haanji, cold drink leke aana, garmi bahut hai 💨
i feel like dev is acting out what do you think
haan mumma, wo thoda naughty ho raha hai, main baat karungi usse 😒
kya kar rahi ho?
padhai kar rahi hun, assignment complete karne ki koshish kar rahi hun 📚
khana khaya?
haanji mumma, already khaya tha, abhi coffee pi rahi hun ☕️
Uske baad kya krna hai
uske baad lab ke liye jaana hai, project submit karna hai 🧿
abhi to raat hai ? raat ko lab?
aree mumma, subah ka lab hai, abhi to main sone ki taiyaari kar rahi hun 😴
par tumne to bola abhi lab jana hai?
sorry mumma, galat bol diya, kal subah ka lab hai, aaj to abhi sone jaa rahi hun 😊
okay daaru mat peena
haanji mumma, don't worry, main daaru nahi peeti, tu relax kar 💕
did you sleep well
haan mumma, acchi neend aayi, thak gayi thi kal raat ko 😴
kya khaogi dinner me?
haanji, pasta banani thi, lekin abhi soch rahi hun, maybe pizza order kar lun 🍕
bohot zyada bahar ka khane lage ho
haan mumma, aaj kal thoda bahar ka hi khana ho raha hai, par ghar ka khana miss kar rahi hun 😔
your health will affect
haanji mumma, i know, main khayal rakhungi, ghar ka khana bhi khaoongi, don't worry 😊
hello beta lunch kiya?
haan mumma, lunch kar liya, college canteen mein khaya 😊
aur dawai li
haanji mumma, dawai bhi le li, tu tension mat lena 😊
iron ke saath aaj calcium bhi leni hai
ok mumma, calcium ki dawai bhi le lungi, dhyan rakhungi 😊
okay have fun beta
thanks mumma, love you, main enjoy karungi 😘💕
whats up with that emoticon
kuch nahi mumma, bas pyaar hai 😊💋
eww apna amoji game up karo
sorry mumma, aaj kal kabhi kabhi emotional ho jaati hun 😂♥️
lol
hehe mumma, tu bhi 😂
tumne dinner kiya
haan mumma, dinner kar liya, dev ke saath pizza khayi 🍕😊
Kya kar rahi ho beta did you sleep?!
haan mumma, abhi uthi hun, thodi der baad so jaoongi, tv dekhti hun 😴📺
khana khayi
haanji mumma, nashta kar liya, toast aur chai piyi 🍞🍵
whats the time?
mumma, abhi 9 baje hai, college jaane ki taiyaari kar rahi hun 📚🕰️
whats time?
abhi 3 baje hai mumma, lunch ke baad free period hai 🕰️😊
whats the time rn?
abhi 12:30 hai mumma, lunch break hai 🕰️🍔
whats the time?
abhi 8 baje hai mumma, subah ki chai pi rahi hun ☕️🕰️
whats the time?
mumma kya hua? 😊
whats time?
Mumma, it's so late, kya hua? 😳
kuch nahi i just wanna know the time
Mumma, it's so late, what's up? 😊
